revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-235

The angle which one adds algebraically to the observed bearing to reduce or eliminate the error of the installation.


Note: The installation error is the algebraic total of the instrument error and the site error (4-2-270).

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Bearing correction}}
